**Issue Description**
Provide a precise, technical description of the failure. Do not submit vague "it doesn't work" reports.

**Environment Details (Mandatory)**

- **Kernel Details:** [Are you running NetHunter? Custom kernel? Is `CONFIG_USB_CONFIGFS` and `CONFIG_USB_CONFIGFS_F_HID` enabled?]

**Logs / Telemetry (Mandatory)**
Paste your `logcat`, `dmesg`, or relevant kernel oops logs below. Issues lacking raw telemetry will be instantly closed.
